desc: Geospatial information on inpatient, outpatient, and mental health hospital facilities across Virginia counties, maintained by the Virginia Geographic Information Network (VGIN).

columns.name: LandmkName
columns.desc: The official name of the healthcare facility or landmark.

columns.name: Address
columns.desc: The physical street address of the hospital facility.

columns.name: City
columns.desc: The city or town where the facility is located.

columns.name: Zip
columns.desc: The 5-digit postal ZIP code for the facility.

columns.name: X
columns.desc: The geographic longitude coordinate in decimal degrees for spatial mapping.

columns.name: Y
columns.desc: The geographic latitude coordinate in decimal degrees for spatial mapping.

columns.name: LastCheck
columns.desc: The timestamp indicating when the facility records were last verified or updated by the source agency.

columns.name: SrcTyp
columns.desc: The specific operating classification of the hospital (e.g., Inpatient Hospital, Outpatient Surgical Hospital).

columns.name: Src
columns.desc: The state agency providing the registry data (e.g., Virginia Department of Health [VDH], Department of General Services [DGS]).

columns.name: FIPScode
columns.desc: The 5-digit Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code uniquely identifying the Virginia county or independent city.

columns.name: FIPSname
columns.desc: The name of the Virginia county or independent city hosting the facility. This matches the output of the string extractor.
